title: Checkpoint Files, Atomic Replacement, Versioning, and Resume · Go Semantics Case: Inflight Requeue
summary: State is gob-encoded in place, partial writes look valid, policies drift, in-flight work becomes complete, and resuming can contact sites before review. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go inflight requeue increment in crash-consistent policy-bound checkpoint. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-…
objectives: Recover claimed and fetching items into bounded retry or review states using attempt and idempotency evidence.
Write temporary state, flush and sync under declared durability, validate, rename atomically, sync directory where required, and retain fallback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

Competency probe: Recover claimed and fetching items into bounded retry or review states using attempt and idempotency evidence.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend the Inflight Requeue model · Theory Inflight Requeue, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Marking in-flight work complete avoids duplicate requests safely.
